name: Farming Isles
short_description: A relaxing farming simulator game that has the player focusing on resource management by maintaining growing crops, watering farmland, building additional structures for extending the stock.
detailed_description:
Welcome to the realm of the Isles!

Farming Isles is an isometric farming simulator where you are in control of designing optimal crop growth for maximum profit. Each Isle is configured to have its own unique feature that differ from one another. Construct the Farming Isles however you wish.

GAMEPLAY

Here you will experience what it takes to keep a sustainable farm functioning by living in the realm of the Isles.

  • Build the Isles of your choice
    Create your own world with a mix of Isles, each one bringing its own layout that changes how you build and grow. Some Isles challenge you with specific building options, while others give you a boost—like faster growth or bigger harvests—opening up all kinds of possibilities.

  • Sell your investments
    When funds are low or priorities shift, sell off your structures or Isles to reclaim valuable resources. Whether you're looking to recoup your investment or simply clear space for new opportunities, it's all part of the strategy!

  • Use the right tool for the right job

    Each tool serves a unique purpose, with no two being alike. Access them through the Toolbar and choose the right one for the job—because every tool has a distinct role to play.

  • The Farm Market is dynamic

    With fluctuation for products in demand, the market updates the prices they will buy your goods for. Sometimes they'll want something a little more.

  • The thieving syndicate is ready

    Watch out for The Vermins! They want everything you got and won't stop till they've achieved it. Be on the look out for them to stop their advancements, otherwise you'll be paying for it.
